name: mouseketool
description: Developer workbench for Java Lambda functions and batch jobs on LocalStack

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe,el -c blue,green,magenta "cd ../backend && npm run dev" "cd ../frontend && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health && cd electron && npx electron ."
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron
scripts.package:win: npm run build:all && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:all && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package: npm run build:all && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
